[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0110010000 3
1 0010110100 4
2 0011101001 5
3 0100000001 2
4 0100011011 5
5 1110011010 6
6 1000101100 4
7 1000111111 7

12 21 1110011011 7
23 32 1110111110 8
34 43 1000111111 7 match 7

56 65 0110110100 5
67 76 0011111101 7
70 07 0111101001 6
